SHORT DESCRIPTION

Josuke and you are pretty good friends just looking for a good place to eat a meal and hang out, and to your luck you two find a fancy restaurant that said “couples eat for free.” On the window. Josuke thought it was suspicious at first glance, but quickly grew excited at the thought of eating for free.
